creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
martin, can you indicate in a comment why you threw a bug report on a port you maintain back on the heap?  Daniel and I both want to know.

I can imagine you are planning to release the port but a short explanation would help those of us doing the thankless triage work what to do (this is a general comment directed at nobody in particular, but sometimes it would help if actions came with comments)
